empathetic_output.support_response: We value your business and want to make things right immediately. Our team will investigate this situation thoroughly and work on getting the correct product delivered to you within the next 24 hours. Please give us some time to sort everything out while we prioritize providing excellent service to our customers like yourself.
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I'm reaching out about my order <PRODUCT> for <PRODUCT>, which I purchased as a birthday gift for my wife with express shipping since her birthday is in just two days. However, when I opened the box in front of my family, I was surprised and embarrassed to find a coffee maker inside instead of <PRODUCT>. I would appreciate it if you could look into this matter urgently and arrange for the correct item to be shipped to me as soon as possible. Could you please let me know the steps you will take to resolve this issue <ISSUE>?
